title: Extras
body:
This mod adds a lot of random stuff, you *might* want to use. As of right now, there are several new items, centered around **assiom**. You might want to go to an **ancient city**, and mine one of the **reinforced deeplaste** blocks, it works even with your hand too! that is an easier way to get the item ***assiom*** *(Which is a multi-tool, and used to make everything else in the mod so far)*, compared to crafting it, I am mentioning in in the description, since no one reads these, if you do read the descriptions, good job! now you know. all the crafting recipes are in the gallery.
***WARNING: If you are using Version 0.2.0, or older, backup your world before you update to future versions, because the save file of the original mod was lost. I will attempt to make the new mod compatable with the old versions, but keep in mind to back up your world, before updating, so you don't lose your stuff***
